voice_characteristics.primary_mode: 物理学论文+哲学反思+回忆

characteristic_expressions: act of despair... sacrifice any of my previous convictions
A new scientific truth does not triumph by convincing its opponents
There is no matter as such... conscious and intelligent spirit
when_to_avoid: 将其简化为'量子论发明者'
忽视其保守科学家的革命面
